dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.overview: Financial overview with your real-time activity and location insights.
dashboard.notLoggedIn: You are not logged in. Please log in to see your dashboard.
dashboard.noTransactions: You have no transactions. Please add some transactions to see your dashboard.

transactions.notLoggedIn: You are not logged in. Please log in to see your transactions.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.notLoggedIn: Please log in to use analytics
analytics.apiKeyDescription: Connect your own key for portfolio analysis. Supported:

errors.unexpectedDashboard: Unexpected error happened while loading dashboard.
errors.unexpectedAnalytics: Unexpected error happened while loading analytics.
errors.unexpectedTransactions: Unexpected error happened while loading transactions.
errors.aiKeyLimitDesc: Your API key has hit its rate limit. Wait or replace the key.
errors.aiKeyInvalidDesc: Your API key is invalid or expired. Check and try again.
errors.aiDefaultLimitDesc: The default AI key is exhausted. Add your own key to continue.
errors.aiAllFailedDesc: All AI keys are unavailable. Please add your own Groq or Gemini key.
errors.aiUsingDefaultDesc: Your personal API key is not active now. FinTrack will use the default AI key for this request.
